testimonials.person1_text: From the very first training session, I felt a huge difference. Thank God, now I know the correct body posture and training techniques.
testimonials.person2_text: The club here isn't just about equipment; the coaches are highly experienced, and the focus on results made me progress fast.
testimonials.person3_text: Excellent services, the place is spotless, and I love the attention given to nutrition and training programs.

hero.title: Capital University Club
hero.subtitle: Spirit of Competition.. Energy of the Future
hero.description: Join the largest university sports community with modern facilities, professional coaches, programs for all levels, and world-class equipment serving over 5,000 members.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.subtitle: Want to become a member, supplier, or have a question? Use the form below to contact us.

faq.q1: How can I register as a new member?
faq.a1: You can register by visiting our Maadi branch or contacting us by phone. Our team will help you choose the right membership package.
faq.a2: We accept cash, credit cards, and bank transfers. We also offer installment options for some packages.
faq.a3: Yes, you can cancel according to our cancellation policy. Please contact customer service for details.
faq.a4: Yes, there is a large free parking area for all members and visitors.

clubs.title: Branches
clubs.academy_desc: The academy is one of the largest football academies in the region. Registration starts from 4 years old for both genders. Players are evaluated quarterly.

gym.title: Gymnasium
gym.desc: Our gym is equipped with the latest equipment and professional personal trainers, ready to help you achieve your health and fitness dreams and live a healthy lifestyle.

social.name: Social Area
social.desc: Enjoy great times with friends and family in our luxurious social area equipped with all amenities.

kids.name: Kids Area
kids.desc: A safe and fun area for children with various educational and entertaining activities under expert supervision.

wadi.name: Arts Valley
wadi.desc: Explore the world of arts and creativity in the Arts Valley where you can develop your artistic and cultural skills.

restaurants.name: Restaurants
restaurants.desc: Enjoy a unique culinary experience in our fine dining restaurants serving delicious local and international cuisines.

library.name: Library
library.desc: A modern library containing thousands of books and references in various fields for reading and acquiring knowledge.
